calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-26-2002 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-29-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: William Strickland, Judge Pro Tem; Clerk Nicole Olcomendy, Reporter Rhonda Aquilina.
Parties present: Richard Lieberman, attorney for plaintiff; Tony Ausakas, reprentative for plaintiff; Raissa Lumba, defendant in pro per.
Case called for trial. Following a further settlement conference, the case has settled. The terms of which are as follows: plaintiff will have judgement for restitution and possession of the premises. The judgment is stayed until Aug-31-2002, at which time the defendant must vacate the premises. If so, plaintiff will vacate the judgment and dismiss the action with prejudice. Each side to bear their own fees and costs.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2002 Failure To Post Jury Fees
